creator: vedran@miletic.net
text:
Current version of textproc/hs-pandoc in Ports is 3.1.8, which is incompatible with current version of textproc/hs-pandoc-crossref in Ports (0.3.16.0).

Version 0.3.17.0 brings Pandoc 3.1.8 compatiblity and other fixes: https://github.com/lierdakil/pandoc-crossref/releases/tag/v0.3.17.0
